title: BC-03 — Academic Offering
description: Data contract for the Academic Offering Bounded Context. Defines Term lifecycle (state machine), AcademicOffer, UEAGroup, UEA, and Schedule aggregates/entities. Covers CSV import (HU-06), term management, and enrollment period control.

Term.description: Aggregate Root. Academic period with a 5-state lifecycle state machine: PLANNING → OFFER_LOADED → IN_ENROLLMENT → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED. Guard conditions enforce valid state transitions.

graduateProgramId.description: Scope to a specific graduate program via BC-04 (R8).

TermStatus.description: State machine states for Term lifecycle.

AcademicOffer.description: Aggregate Root. Set of UEA groups offered in a specific term. Created from CSV import (HU-06).

UEAGroup.description: Entity within AcademicOffer. Specific section of a UEA within the quarterly offer. The unit selectable by students (HU-07). availableQuota is decremented on advisor approval (HU-08), NOT on student selection.

quota.description: Total student capacity. Initialized from CSV.

availableQuota.description: Remaining availability. Initialized equal to quota on CSV import.

professorId.description: Reference to Professor in BC-02 (R9). Resolved during CSV import via ProfessorQueryPort.

Schedule.description: Value Object. Time block assigned to a group.

UEA.description: Aggregate Root. Teaching-Learning Unit from the academic catalog. Independent of any term or offer.

name.description: UEA name. E.g. 'Ingeniería de Software I'.

UploadAcademicOfferCommand.description: Command to upload a CSV file with schedules and lotteries for a term (HU-06). Processed by CsvAcademicOfferAdapter (ACL). Term must be in PLANNING state. Transitions Term to OFFER_LOADED on success.

csvFile.description: Multipart CSV file. Parsed by CsvParserPort (ACL).

OpenEnrollmentCommand.description: Command to open the enrollment period for a term. Transitions Term from OFFER_LOADED to IN_ENROLLMENT. Requires COORDINATOR role.

CsvImportResult.description: Read model returned after CSV upload. Contains parsed data and validation report.

errors.description: Row-level errors that prevented import of specific rows.

AcademicOfferResponse.description: Read model for the full academic offer of a term.
